betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pressurizer§f:
The Pressurizer (nuclearcraft:pressurizer) is a single-block machine that processes materials under high pressure. It is used for recipes that require intense pressure conditions to transform.

§6Slot Layout (PressurizerRecipes.java)§f:
The Pressurizer has 1 item input slot and 1 item output slot (or 1 fluid input + 1 fluid output for fluid recipes). The base class is BasicProcessorRecipeHandler with a (1, 0, 1, 0) layout.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:100)§f:
Pattern "PTP / ACA / PTP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, T = ingotTough, A = actuator, C = chassis. Yields 1 Pressurizer.

§6What It Does (PressurizerRecipes.java)§f:
The Pressurizer handles high-pressure material transformations:
- §bWater → High-Pressure Steam§f (alternative to Fission Heater path)
- §bPreheated Water → High-Pressure Steam§f at lower energy cost
- §bFission product compression§f: depleted fuel forms are recompressed into ingots
- §bDiamond synthesis§f: low-quality diamond dust + high pressure → diamond
- §bEmerald synthesis§f: low-quality emerald dust + high pressure → emerald
- §bQuartz compression§f: dustQuartz → gemQuartz under pressure
- §bDense plate formation§f: ingotX + pressure → plateX (alternative to Assembler)

§6Direct Descendants of Pressurizer (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 3 items in the Pressurizer recipe:
- plateAdvanced (nuclearcraft:part:1)
- ingotTough (nuclearcraft:alloy:1)
- actuator (nuclearcraft:part:9)

§6Role in NC Production§f:
The Pressurizer is a §bspecialty machine§f for recipes that don't fit the Manufactory/Ingot Former pattern. It is most useful for:
- Converting fluids into denser forms (HP Steam, dense alloys)
- Producing gem forms of compressed dust
- Mass-producing plates in parallel with the Assembler

§6Pressure vs Vacuum§f:
NC's tech tree has both a §bPressurizer§f (high pressure) and a §bVacuum Chamber§f (QMD, low pressure). These are inverse operations:
- §bPressurizer§f: compresses materials, increases density, requires positive pressure
- §bVacuum Chamber§f: removes air, lowers pressure, used for QMD's particle physics

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30021 (Alloy Furnace) — the basic NC unlock.

§eTip§f: For early-game, use the Pressurizer to mass-produce HP Steam as a backup to the Fission Heater. The Pressurizer path is more RF-efficient for small batches.

§eTip§f: Combine a Pressurizer with a Condenser to create a closed-loop HP Steam cycle. This dramatically reduces water consumption in your turbine setup.

§cWarning§f: Some Pressurizer recipes (e.g. diamond synthesis) require extremely high pressure. If the machine lacks sufficient power, the recipe will not start.
